name: agent-sdlc
description: A full-SDLC pipeline for AI coding agents: idea -> acceptance criteria -> architecture -> techstack -> atomic task plan -> readiness gate -> test-first subagent-driven build -> reviewed PR. Run the whole chain or invoke any stage standalone, resolving its input from any source (prompt, doc, Linear, repo) without weakening the gate or traceability. A dependency-free enforcement-spine checker (sdlc-check, bare node) verifies the pipeline's mechanically-decidable promises — trace integrity, bidirectional coverage, ledger/git correspondence, green-bar evidence, and the terminal AC->proof map at ship; gate/build/ship invoke it fail-closed with an announced degraded fallback. Plus skills for writing the project README and full repository documentation.
